case_title: PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS. JOSE A. MELENDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, JOSE A. $686.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $751.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
